<!-- Thanks for contributing to the SignalX docs! A short description and a checklist below is plenty for most PRs. -->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] Docs content (new page, edit, typo fix)
- [ ] Site styling / layout
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling
- [ ] Dependency bump

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Internal links resolve (use relative paths, e.g. `/router/docs/install`)
- [ ] Live code blocks (if any) compile and run

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456". Optional. -->
